description: Macro specimen color photograph (800x450) of an insect, accompanying a CBP agriculture story about a 'first in nation' pest interception. The image is a high-magnification side profile of a snout beetle (a weevil) set against a solid black background; the photo shows its mottled brown and tan scaled body, segmented legs, antennae, and the elongated snout or rostrum and dark eye. The lighting is studio macro photography. There is no graphic-design overlay, text, caption, slogan, or agency seal applied to the image. The context (San Juan CBP officers and an agriculture specialist finding the pest on an aircraft from Senegal) is provided by the tweet, not the picture.
